C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\vpn-gui.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\vpn-gui.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\vpn-gui.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -mwindows -municode -static -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\vpn-gui.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o VPN-TEIVRIM.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libVPN-TEIVRIM.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\vpn-gui.dir\linkLibs.rsp
